notes: Spoken TED talk from Jarvis — the AI speaking. Almost the entire song is ribbon (monologue). AUDITED 2026-04-20: the old 'every weight-bearing line is a key' approach had 7 keys; kept only the thesis ('That's not code. It's faith.') and the close ('Thank you.'). Every other earlier moment is now a big ribbon with emphasis preserved. The sparse keys now actually feel sacred — a Jarvis monologue shouldn't be billboards, it should be a voice.

chunks.note: I can't find the seam. — admission, big cyan ribbon
I filled it. — pivot ribbon, mixed
I do it anyway. — ribbon faith
That's not code. It's faith. — the thesis, KEY, biggest moment
So here's my TED talk - ask Me. — invitation, big mixed ribbon
Thank you. — the close, KEY, held
